plugins.name: git-cleanup
plugins.description: Audit local branches and worktrees against GitHub PR state, auto-clean safe ones, prompt on the rest.

plugins.name: ridl-lsp
plugins.description: RIDL language server for .ridl schema files.

plugins.name: agent-comms
plugins.description: Two agent sessions (e.g. Claude author + Codex reviewer) autonomously iterate on an artifact through a shared file until they converge or hit an impasse.
